menu.projects.reports.long: Comprehensive quarterly cross-department performance and project progress trend report
settings.title: Appearance
settings.customColor.hint: Pick any color; a full palette is generated from it
dashboard.title: لوحة التحكم
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of projects and activity
projects.demo.title: Projects (demo)
projects.demo.body: This sample page exercises lazy routes, the breadcrumb and the multi-level menu. The full projects module ships in Phase 6.
error.404.title: Page not found
error.404.body: The address does not exist or has moved.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.timeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: What you were looking for wasn't found.
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with the current data state.
errors.validation: The submitted data is not valid.
errors.tooMany: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.server: A server error occurred. The team has been notified.
errors.unexpected: Something unexpected went wrong. Details were logged to the console.
confirm.title: Confirm action
dashboard.activity.title: Recent activity
playground.title: Phase 2 Playground
playground.subtitle: Each button exercises one piece of the technical core: mock API, loading bar, retry, timeout, error mapping, toast/confirm and the global handler.
playground.success.title: Successful request
playground.success.hint: GET /api/projects — top loading bar + skeleton + success toast
playground.errors.title: HTTP errors
playground.errors.hint: Each status maps to a proper localized message
playground.network.title: Network failure + retry
playground.network.hint: Status 0 → two automatic retries, then an error toast (~1.5s)
playground.timeout.title: Timeout
playground.timeout.hint: Server takes 8s but this request only allows 3s
playground.confirm.title: Confirm dialog
playground.crash.title: Runtime error
playground.crash.hint: Throws an Error → GlobalErrorHandler → console + toast
playground.table.name: Project
error.500.title: Server error
error.500.body: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again shortly.
menu.customize.title: Customize menu
menu.customize.hint: Pin favorites to the top of the menu, or hide items you don't use. These preferences are saved per account.

auth.login.subtitle: أدخل بياناتك للمتابعة

auth.invalidCredentials: اسم المستخدم أو كلمة المرور غير صحيحة
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.forgot.title: Reset password
auth.forgot.hint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgot.sent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
auth.forgot.phoneHint: أدخل رقم جوالك وسنرسل لك رمز التحقق.
auth.forgot.otpHint: أدخل الرمز المُرسَل إلى {{hint}} (الرمز التجريبي دائمًا 111111)
auth.forgot.success: تم التحقق من الرمز. يمكنك الآن تعيين كلمة مرور جديدة.
profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Display name
profile.password.title: Change password
profile.menu.title: عرض القائمة الجانبية
profile.menu.desc: عند التفعيل، تنطوي مجموعات القائمة وتتوسّع بالنقر (أكورديون). عند الإيقاف، تُعرض القائمة كاملةً موسّعة.
profile.menu.flat: الوضع الكامل (عرض القائمة كاملةً دون طي)
rolesDemo.title: الأدوار والصلاحيات
rolesDemo.body: هذه الصفحة محمية بواسطة roleGuard ولا يصل إليها سوى دور admin. يوضّح الجدول أدناه صلاحيات كل دور. انتقل إلى «إدارة الفريق» لتعديل الأعضاء وتغيير الأدوار مباشرة.
error.403.title: Access denied
error.403.body: You don't have permission to view this page.

table.inlineHint: Click the name cell to edit inline; Enter saves.

wizard.rangeHint: Pick a start date, then an end date

playground.picker.hint: Four modes; switch Jalali/Gregorian inside the panel. The emitted value is always a native Date.
table.name: اسم المشروع
wizard.rangeRequired: Start and end dates are required
upload.drop: Drop files here or click to browse
pickerDemo.title: Date & time picker
pickerDemo.subtitle: One component, five modes — Jalali and Gregorian, switchable at runtime

analytics.subtitle: Change the date range and every chart refreshes

kanban.emptyCol: No tasks here — drop a card
task.title: Task title

gantt.subtitle: Project timelines over a 6-month window — click any bar
team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Members, roles and activation
cal.title: Event calendar
cal.hint: Click a day to create an event; click an event to edit. The grid follows the active calendar (Jalali for Persian).
files.title: File manager
files.name: Name
playground.socket.title: Live notification
playground.socket.hint: WebSocket simulation — one also arrives automatically every 20–45s
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
tour.menu.title: Main menu
tour.menu.body: Every section lives here. The menu is multi-level, and from its footer you can pin or hide items.
tour.toggle.title: Collapse the menu
tour.toggle.body: Use this button (or Ctrl+B) to slim or expand the menu. On mobile it becomes a drawer.
tour.palette.title: Global search
tour.palette.body: Press Ctrl+K to jump to any page or run quick commands (theme, language, sign out…).
tour.bell.title: Notifications
tour.bell.body: Live notifications arrive here — the unread count shows on the bell.
tour.settings.title: Appearance settings
tour.settings.body: Color theme, custom brand color, font, dark mode and language — all live, from this panel.
whatsnew.title: ما الجديد
gallery.title: Component gallery
gallery.subtitle: Live PrimeNG components — a dev reference and a theme / dark-mode / RTL check
views.title: العروض
profile.2fa.title: Two-factor authentication
profile.2fa.desc: For extra security, a verification code is required at sign-in.
formBuilder.title: Dynamic form builder
formBuilder.subtitle: Build a form from JSON — live preview on the right
ai.title: ملخّص ذكي
ai.hint: اضغط «حلّل» للحصول على ملخّص تلقائي لمشاريعك.
ai.disclaimer: تم إنشاء هذا الملخّص تلقائيًا من البيانات الحالية.

teller.system.title: حالة النظام
settings.surfaceStyle.hint: كيفية عرض البطاقات والشريط الجانبي والحوارات
rolesDemo.role.admin: وصول كامل لكل شيء: إدارة المستخدمين والأدوار وإعدادات النظام.
rolesDemo.role.manager: إدارة المشاريع والمهام؛ دون الوصول لإدارة المستخدمين أو إعدادات النظام.
rolesDemo.role.member: عرض لوحة التحكم وتعديل المهام المُسندة؛ دون صلاحيات إدارية.
themePack.title: حزمة المظهر
themePack.hint: اختيار واحد يضبط كل شيء: لون الخلفية (والشريط الجانبي)، لون العلامة، الحدود والظل
settings.viewMode.title: وضع العرض
settings.viewMode.hint: التبديل بين لوحة التحكم وواجهة الموقع العامة
landing.hero.title: Your organization's finances, unified in one platform
landing.hero.subtitle: Accounts, transfers, facilities, cards and wallets, reports — all in one secure, fast dashboard, integrated with the national banking infrastructure.
landing.stats.title: Trusted by large organizations
landing.features.title: Everything you need to manage organizational finance
landing.features.f1.d: See and manage rial and currency accounts, cash flow and statements in one place.
landing.features.f2.d: Satna, Paya, group transfers and bill payments with cartable and multi-step approval.
landing.features.f3.d: Installments, balances, cheques, clearing and deposit certificates at a glance.
landing.features.f4.d: Issue and manage gift cards, voucher cards and staff wallets in bulk.
landing.features.f5.d: Financial, transaction and fee reports with Excel and PDF export.
landing.features.f6.d: Two-factor auth, role-based access control and full data encryption.
landing.access.title: Banking anyone can use with ease
landing.access.desc: A clean, clear Persian RTL interface — from junior staff to senior managers, everyone works without complex training.
landing.steps.title: Get started in three steps
landing.steps.s1.d: Register your organization and define users and roles.
landing.steps.s2.d: Connect and verify your bank accounts.
landing.steps.s3.d: Manage transfers, payments and reports from one dashboard.
landing.pricing.title: A plan that fits your organization
landing.cta.title: Transform your finance management today
landing.cta.subtitle: No credit card required, start in minutes.
landing.team.title: بُني بواسطة خبراء المصرفية والبرمجيات
landing.team.desc: فريق من المهندسين وخبراء المصرفية بسنوات من الخبرة في البنية التحتية المالية صمم هذه المنصة لاحتياجات المؤسسات الحقيقية.
